task_description: Hackathon finance-track project: LLM-based demographic persona simulation with social graph to predict market sentiment on real news, backtested against a reliable industry sentiment indicator, with a US/Texas geographic UI.
initial_idea: LLM personas representing Texas/US demographics react to real post-training-cutoff news about companies. Social graph baked in. Backtest against an industry-accepted sentiment indicator. UI: US/Texas heatmap + demographic panels + headline banner. 48h hackathon, AWS credits, small models. Audience: Jane Street / JRT finance judges.
